---
title: "Swin Attention"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.method-page}
# Swin / Window Attention

Swin attention restricts self-attention to local windows and shifts the windows between layers. For ocean residuals,
this tests whether local attention is better matched to fronts, eddies and coastal structures than global attention:

$$
\mathrm{Attention}(Q,K,V)=\mathrm{softmax}\left(\frac{QK^\top}{\sqrt{d}}\right)V.
$$

OceanLens `v7a` uses this hypothesis: local windows may recover mesoscale patterns with less computation than global
DiT attention.

Reference: [Swin Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2103.14030).
:::
